description: Surgical macOS cleanup of VS Code 'context-menu' equivalents: Finder Services workflows, Login Items, LaunchAgents/LaunchDaemons referencing VS Code, code/code-insiders PATH shims, and vscode:// URL handler registrations.

messages.scriptDisabled: Script disabled in config.json (set 'enabled': true to run).
messages.wrongOs: This script targets macOS only. Detected OS: {os}. Aborting (no changes made).
messages.needsSudo: Category '{id}' is in 'system' scope and requires sudo. Re-run with sudo, or pass --scope user to limit to ~/Library only.
messages.modeApply: APPLY mode: changes will be made. Pass --dry-run to preview only.
messages.modeDryRun: DRY-RUN mode: no changes will be made.
messages.summary: Cleanup summary -- removed: {removed}, would-remove: {would}, missing: {missing}, failed: {failed} (scope={scope}, mode={mode}).
messages.rerunWithDryRun: Tip: re-run with --dry-run first to preview the exact set of paths/labels that will be removed.
